key_strengths: Specification lock-in in industrial OEM applications
~$4.9B adjusted FCF at 23.4% adjusted operating margins
CEO Bill Brown early execution credible — 250 new products, margins +200 bps in 2025
key_risks: PFAS liability not fully bounded — state-level claims beyond federal settlement remain live
GAAP FCF (~$1.4B) severely depressed vs. adjusted FCF (~$4.9B) through 2036 settlement drain
Thin organic revenue growth (~1.2% in 2024, guided 3-4%) highly macro-dependent
Combined Chairman/CEO structure weakens governance oversight
Tail risk: undiscovered legacy chemical liability from 120-year manufacturing history
red_flags: GAAP operating cash flow of $1.8B in 2024 vs. $6.7B prior year due to $3.1B settlement payments
Shareholder equity only ~$3.9B against $39.9B total assets — extremely thin cushion
53.6% dividend cut in 2024 ended 66-year dividend growth streak
Credit ratings under pressure: Moody's A3 negative, S&P BBB+ CreditWatch negative
Historical buybacks at 2015–2019 peak prices destroyed capital
buy_triggers: Stock pulls back to $100–$115, providing 30–35% margin of safety vs. conservative intrinsic value
Formal legal ruling or regulatory confirmation fully closing PFAS liability beyond federal settlement
Two to three consecutive quarters of 4%+ organic growth with margin expansion toward 25%+
sell_triggers: New unsettled litigation liability category emerging requiring $5B+ beyond current accruals
Organic growth negative for two+ consecutive years combined with operating margins below 20%
Stock reaches $175–185 without material thesis improvement — asymmetry inverts
valuation_summary: Conservative intrinsic value is $100–$115 (normalized owner earnings ~$9–10/share × 14–15x); at ~$153 the stock offers no margin of safety, with probability-weighted fair value ~$147 and a 1:1 upside/downside ratio that does not clear the bar for a high-conviction entry.
source_summary: Web search for current financials, settlement details, and price data (March 2026); training knowledge for historical metrics; data for 2025 fiscal year financials may carry some staleness risk.
